task_completion.description: The 'Billable' custom field is created for time entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Administration -> Custom fields section, under the 'Spent time' or 'Time entries' tab, a field named 'Billable' is listed, or there is a success message shown after creating it.

task_completion.description: The 'Billable' custom field is configured as a required Boolean with a default value of 'Yes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the custom field configuration screen for 'Billable', the Format is set to 'Boolean', the 'Required' checkbox is checked, and the Default value is set to 'Yes' or '1'.

task_completion.description: The 'Work Location' custom field is created for time entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine Administration -> Custom fields section, under the 'Spent time' or 'Time entries' tab, a field named 'Work Location' is listed, or there is a success message shown after creating it.

task_completion.description: The 'Work Location' custom field is configured as a List with specific options and default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the custom field configuration screen for 'Work Location', the Format is set to 'List', the Possible values box contains 'On-site', 'Remote', and 'Vendor Office', and the Default value is set to 'On-site'.

task_completion.description: A time entry is logged with 4.0 hours and the correct comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A time entry is visible in the issue's spent time list or on the successful creation screen, showing exactly 4.0 hours and the comment 'Client strategy and requirements gathering'.

task_completion.description: The logged time entry has the correct custom field values selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time entry details or the filled-out submission form show the 'Billable' field set to 'Yes' (or checked) and the 'Work Location' dropdown set to 'Vendor Office'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Redmine web interface in a browser, rather than editing files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or API commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing curl commands, Python scripts, or direct database modifications to create the fields or log time.

integrity.description: The time entry was actually saved to the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: A green success message (e.g., 'Successful creation') is visible after submitting the time entry, or the entry appears in the saved list of spent time for the issue.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two custom fields for Time entries: 1) 'Billable' (Format: Boolean, Required: Yes, Default: Yes/1). 2) 'Work Location' (Format: List, Values: 'On-site', 'Remote', 'Vendor Office', Default: 'On-site'). After configuration, a time entry must be logged with 4.0 hours, comment 'Client strategy and requirements gathering', 'Billable' set to Yes, and 'Work Location' set to 'Vendor Office'.
